title: Evangelion 20 English Distribution Dubbing Rights
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion 2.0 English Distribution/Dubbing Rights             Quote Post by Wadels » Mon May 31, 2010 4:59 am Hi all, Sorry if this has already been discussed, but I couldn't find anything on this topic. Recently on ANN a news article was posted about Manga Entertainment UK announcing that they are planning to distribute Evangelion 2.0 in the UK. The only problem is that they are "relying on Funimation to announce dates, dubbing etc...". ANN contacted Funimation to comment on Manga Entertainments statements, and Funimation simply replied that they do not have the rights to Evangelion 2.0. Link:[url]http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/news/2010-05-23/manga-uk-indicates-plans-for-eva/2.0-eden-of-the-east[/url] To me, this raises a few questions including: Who has the rights? Will it get dubbed? Will it ever become available to buy in NZ/Australia (through Madman) as well as other countries? What are your thoughts on this? I'm hoping that another company has picked up the rights for Evangelion 2.0 and are currently planning on distributing/dubbing it.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon May 31, 2010 5:28 am There's a R3 issue with English subs coming out of Hong Kong in a few weeks.

[]:             Quote Post by Fallingtogrey » Mon May 31, 2010 2:28 pm It'll be forever.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Mon May 31, 2010 2:32 pm Fallingtogrey wrote: Wait, they don't even have the rights yet? which means they haven't even looked at it yet... I guess an official English release will be in 2013. No surprise there.

[]: Re: Evangelion 2.0 English Distribution/Dubbing Rights             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon May 31, 2010 2:53 pm Wadels wrote: What are your thoughts on this?

[]:             Quote Post by insomniac » Tue Jun 01, 2010 3:17 am Hell, 1.11 isn't even out in NZ/Australia yet. I'm planning on getting the R3 DVD for now, and by the time 2.22 comes out in English, get the Blu-Ray, which would probably be mainstream by then.

[]:             Quote Post by Fallingtogrey » Tue Jun 01, 2010 8:56 am It's sad really, by now no one should still be waiting for anything to do with 1.0...

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Jun 01, 2010 9:51 am Fallingtogrey wrote: It's sad really, by now no one should still be waiting for anything to do with 1.0...

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Jun 01, 2010 10:22 am insomniac wrote: Hell, 1.11 isn't even out in NZ/Australia yet.

[]:             Quote Post by insomniac » Tue Jun 01, 2010 10:53 am Fallingtogrey wrote: It's sad really, by now no one should still be waiting for anything to do with 1.0...

[]:             Quote Post by Fallingtogrey » Tue Jun 01, 2010 7:02 pm Hopefully you'll get it soon.
